data.body: ddbe CLOSED. Completion-verifier initially FAILED (real gap: E2E test asserted 3/4 fields, missing keys assertion for --output llm per AC2). Verified show --output llm renders keys correctly (impl fine); strengthened E2E test with KEY assertion, amended ddbe commit (c19b467a6, Change-Id preserved). Re-close PASSED completion-verifier -> ddbe closed + signed. ddbe DONE (change 558 both gates green + ticket closed).
